name: equity-research
description: Slow-layer equity research as a Claude Code plugin: the /research-company orchestrator (2-stage CDD + quant/strategic/tactical/flow overlays + catalyst-scout + pm-supervisor + single evaluator gate) emitting a BUY/HOLD/TRIM/SELL execution recommendation, plus /evaluate. US equities, multi-month horizon, paper-only (v0.1).
